name: AI Agent Studio
description: Core agent building workspace for designing, configuring, and testing AI agents with a three-panel editor, tool management, and live preview.

page_briefs.agents: Grid of agent cards showing name, model badge, tool count pill, and status indicator (active/draft/archived). Top bar with search input and prominent 'Create Agent' button. Sidebar lists recently edited agents for quick access.
page_briefs.agent-detail: Three-panel layout. Left panel shows a collapsible tool tree with drag-to-reorder. Center panel is a full-height prompt editor with syntax highlighting and variable interpolation. Right panel streams a live preview of agent responses with token count and latency metrics.
page_briefs.agent-config: Grouped form sections for agent parameters: model selector dropdown, temperature slider with numeric readout, max-tokens input, system prompt textarea with character count, and toggle switches for streaming, tool-use, and memory. Save and reset buttons anchored at bottom.
page_briefs.agent-tools: Split view with tool list on the left showing tool name, type icon, and validation status badge. Selecting a tool opens a JSON schema editor on the right with inline validation errors and a 'Test Tool' button that runs a dry invocation.

shells.sidebar-aside: Collapsible sidebar for agent navigation with main content area and optional right aside panel
